sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47312" key="h(mite/xnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-τέχνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47312.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half</tr_> (i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trivial</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">art</tr_>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:p.110H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
